help.short: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="constraints">
<prop type="array" name="values">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="recordMap" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="resourceMap">
<prop type="array" name="scopeMap">
<prop type="array" name="processors" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="allowedFormats">
<prop type="array" name="pipelines" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="processors">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="tlsConfigurations">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

command.name: create

help.short: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

command.argGroup:
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints" options="constraints">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints[].values" options="values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters" options="exporters" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.recordMap" options="record-map" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.resourceMap" options="resource-map">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.scopeMap" options="scope-map">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.processors" options="processors" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.receivers" options="receivers" group="Properties">
<help short="OTLP GRPC endpoint definition. Example: 0.0.0.0:."/>
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.receivers[].syslog.allowedFormats" options="allowed-formats">
<help short="Syslog receiver endpoint definition. Example: 0.0.0.0:."/>
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines" options="pipelines" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].exporters" options="exporters" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].processors" options="processors">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].receivers" options="receivers" required="True">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.tlsConfigurations" options="tls-configurations" group="Properties">

help.short: The name of the extended location.
The type of the extended location.
The geo-location where the resource lives

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="constraints" arg="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints">
<prop type="array" name="values" arg="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints[].values">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" arg="$resource.properties.exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="recordMap" arg="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.recordMap" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="resourceMap" arg="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.resourceMap">
<prop type="array" name="scopeMap" arg="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.scopeMap">
<prop type="array" name="processors" arg="$resource.properties.processors" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" arg="$resource.properties.receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="allowedFormats" arg="$resource.properties.receivers[].syslog.allowedFormats">
<prop type="array" name="pipelines" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="processors" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].processors">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="tlsConfigurations" arg="$resource.properties.tlsConfigurations">

<prop type="array" name="constraints">
<prop type="array" name="values">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="recordMap" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="resourceMap">
<prop type="array" name="scopeMap">
<prop type="array" name="processors" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="allowedFormats">
<prop type="array" name="pipelines" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="processors">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="tlsConfigurations">

command.name: update

help.short: The name of pipeline group. The name is case insensitive.

command.argGroup:
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints" options="constraints">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints[].values" options="values">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters" options="exporters" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.recordMap" options="record-map">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.resourceMap" options="resource-map">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.scopeMap" options="scope-map">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.processors" options="processors" group="Properties">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.receivers" options="receivers" group="Properties">
<help short="OTLP GRPC endpoint definition. Example: 0.0.0.0:."/>
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.receivers[].syslog.allowedFormats" options="allowed-formats">
<help short="Syslog receiver endpoint definition. Example: 0.0.0.0:."/>
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines" options="pipelines">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].exporters" options="exporters">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].processors" options="processors">
<arg type="array" var="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].receivers" options="receivers">
<arg nullable="True" type="array" var="$resource.properties.tlsConfigurations" options="tls-configurations" group="Properties">

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="constraints">
<prop type="array" name="values">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="recordMap" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="resourceMap">
<prop type="array" name="scopeMap">
<prop type="array" name="processors" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="allowedFormats">
<prop type="array" name="pipelines" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="processors">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="tlsConfigurations">

<prop type="array" name="constraints" arg="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints">
<prop type="array" name="values" arg="$resource.properties.executionPlacement.constraints[].values">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" arg="$resource.properties.exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="recordMap" arg="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.recordMap" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="resourceMap" arg="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.resourceMap">
<prop type="array" name="scopeMap" arg="$resource.properties.exporters[].azureMonitorWorkspaceLogs.api.schema.scopeMap">
<prop type="array" name="processors" arg="$resource.properties.processors" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" arg="$resource.properties.receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="allowedFormats" arg="$resource.properties.receivers[].syslog.allowedFormats">
<prop type="array" name="pipelines" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="processors" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].processors">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" arg="$resource.properties.service.pipelines[].receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="tlsConfigurations" arg="$resource.properties.tlsConfigurations">

<prop type="array" name="constraints">
<prop type="array" name="values">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="recordMap" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="resourceMap">
<prop type="array" name="scopeMap">
<prop type="array" name="processors" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="allowedFormats">
<prop type="array" name="pipelines" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="exporters" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="processors">
<prop type="array" name="receivers" required="True">
<prop type="array" name="tlsConfigurations">
